meta.title: GB Valuation — Certified Property & Asset Valuations
meta.description: Professional, legally recognised valuation certificates for property, estates, insurance and business assets. Certified valuers working to ECO, RICS and IVS standards.

hero.subtitle: We carry out every type of valuation in accordance with national and international standards — ECO, RICS and IVS — for any purpose.

services.label: Our Services
services.subtitle: From apartments to business assets — every report is prepared to international standards and recognised by banks, courts and state institutions.

residential.title: Residential Property
residential.desc: Professional valuation of apartments, houses, cottages and other residential properties.

commercial.title: Commercial Property
commercial.desc: Comprehensive determination of the value of office, retail and service properties.

industrial.title: Industrial Property
industrial.desc: Objective valuation of warehouses, production spaces and industrial complexes.

land.title: Land Plots
land.desc: Determining the market value of agricultural, industrial and commercial land plots.

business.title: Business Assets
business.desc: Valuation of company assets, machinery, equipment and intangible assets.

legal.title: Legal Valuation
legal.desc: Valuation for court cases, inheritance and divorce to international standards.

needs.label: When You Need It
needs.subtitle: Knowing the precise value of a property is essential in many situations — from financial to legal decisions. Here are the most common cases when you need our report.

buySell.title: Buying & Selling Property
buySell.desc: Knowing the real market value helps you close the deal at a fair price and avoid financial risk.

loan.title: Bank Loans & Mortgages
loan.desc: Banks require an independent valuation to issue a loan or mortgage — our report is recognised by every bank.

insurance.title: Property Insurance
insurance.desc: An accurate value determines the insurance premium and the payout amount in the event of damage.

court.title: Court Disputes
court.desc: Objective and independent valuation for property disputes and court proceedings, to international standards.

inheritance.title: Inheritance & Division
inheritance.desc: Fair distribution of property among heirs or parties — with transparent, well-grounded value.

investment.title: Investment & Taxation
investment.desc: For sound investment and tax decisions — know the true value of your asset.

needs.ctaText: Can't find your case? Get in touch — we'll help.

expert.label: Our Team
expert.description: GB Valuation is a valuation company certified by the National Bank of Georgia. We perform every type of valuation in accordance with the ECO, RICS and IVS international standards.
credentials: Certified by the National Bank of Georgia
expert.name: Giorgi Beridze

footer.ctaSubtext: Get in touch — response within 1 business day
footer.description: A valuation company certified by the National Bank of Georgia. ECO, RICS and IVS standards.
footer.certNote: Our valuations are recognised by all banks, courts and government bodies.
